prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: UPD-STYLINGHEAD-ARIEL-87252-HPNR
Product Type: TOY_FIGURE
Brand (from catalog): Disney Princess
Existing Title: Disney Princess Ariel Styling Head, Red Hair, 10 Piece Pretend Play Set, The Little Mermaid, by Just Play
Description: The Disney Princess Ariel Styling Head holds endless hair play possibilities. Ariel features beautiful, shiny red hair that is perfect for brushing and styling. This curious Princess comes with nine fun, wear and share accessories including: one dinglehopper hairbrush, two seashell hair barrettes, two Flounder hair barrettes, three elastic bands, and one tiara. This Ariel styling head is part of our Disney Ultimate Princess Celebration Collection and features a metallic purple bodice, shimmery teal necklace, and gold accessories including a hairbrush, flounder barrettes, and tiara. Kids can use Ariel's dinglehopper brush to brush her hair and create lots of fun hair styles. Your little one will love using the adorable hair barrettes to style and decorate Ariel's shiny, flowing locks. They can even use the hair barrettes in their own hair for even more fashion fun. Ages 3+
Search Terms: (none)
Features:
- The Disney Princess Ariel Styling Head holds endless hair play possibilities! Ariel features beautiful, shiny red hair that is perfect for brushing and styling.
- Part of our Disney Ultimate Princess Celebration Collection!
- Disney Princess Ariel Styling Head comes with long red hair and nine styling accessories.
- This 10-piece set includes: one Ariel styling head, one dinglehopper hairbrush, two seashell hair barrettes, two Flounder hair barrettes, three elastic bands, and one tiara.
- Kids can use the brush to create fun hair styles on Ariel!

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Princess Ariel Styling Head, Red Hair, 10-Piece

openai.item_name: Disney Princess 10-Piece Ariel Red Styling Head

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10-Piece Set With Brush And Accessories, Shiny Red Hair, Dinglehopper Brush, Barrettes, Tiara, Ages 3

openai.title_differentiation: Long Red Hair, 9 Styling Accessories, Dinglehopper Brush, Seashell And Flounder Barrettes, Tiara, Ages 3 And Up
